title: Merry Christmas!
desc: The Phantom Thieves have gathered for a Christmas party. Shun has even said he'll make something, but...

title: Virtual New Year's Underway
desc: Harvest World Online is hosting a comeback event for the holidays. Yui has been complaining about the proceedings, but it seems there will be some big changes this year...

title: Gifts for Always Doing Your Best
desc: Kotone is worried about how busy Tomoko is dealing with the holiday rush at her job at the drugstore. We decided to go buy Tomoko some gifts...

title: New Year's with the Miyashita Family
desc: As I was doing some year-end shopping, I bumped into Minami. It seems like Minami's store is busy with stocking up for customers buying things for their first shrine visits of the year...

title: Happy New Year
desc: Quite some time has passed since the new year began, and the New Year's atmosphere has completely died down, when all of a sudden Yaoling shows up to... wish me a Happy New Year...?

title: Lunar New Year Greetings
desc: To celebrate Lunar New Year, I decide to go around my neighborhood with Yaoling. Although we can't visit Tomiyama since she's away, we're able to go to the Miyashita family's izakaya. Minami also shows interest in Lunar New Year...

title: Chinatown Celebrations
desc: Yaoling, Minami, and I decide to visit Chinatown, which should be bursting with life on Lunar New Year. Despite the beautiful decorations, however, people there don't seem to be very festive...

title: Hero Show
desc: A hero show is taking place at a nearby park in Chinatown. We spot Kamiyama, who's trying to become a costumed stuntman...

title: City of Stolen Desire
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. Lufel suspects that desires are being stolen from Chinatown. We decide to use the Metaverse Navigator and test his theory by checking out the situation in the Metaverse...
targetText2: Clear with everyone's HP 50% or higher

title: Anomalies in Mementos
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. The Shadows in Mementos are acting strange. We have to defeat the oncoming Shadows!
targetText2: Clear with everyone's HP 50% or higher
targetText3: Clear with 2 male party members besides Wonder

title: Return to Chinatown
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. We're running out of time. We have to defeat the Shadows and get back to everyone...
targetText2: Clear with only Fire or Bless party members
targetText3: At the end of battle, no allies have spiritual ailments

title: Shiina's Testimony
desc: There's definitely been a decrease in the number of people at the festival. From talking to Shiina, who has been selling limited-edition Lunar New Year drinks at the venue, it sounds like the festival stalls have been really quiet this year...

title: Save the Lion Dance
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. The event staff arrived in a panic, announcing the cancellation of the lion dance performance. Yaoling emphasized the importance of the dance for Lunar New Year, and even offered to perform, but...
targetText2: Clear with everyone's HP 50% or higher
targetText3: Use 3 or more Fire skills during battle

title: Head to Mementos
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. Lufel continues to suspect that the reason for everyone's stolen desire lies in Mementos. We need to defeat Shadows and find the true cause.
targetText2: Clear with everyone's HP 50% or higher
targetText3: Use 1 or more All-Out Attacks during battle

title: Defeat the Shadow
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. I need to get back to everyone after defeating the Shadows.
targetText2: Clear without a Saboteur party member
targetText3: Use 2 or more Highlights during battle

title: Enjoy Lunar New Year
desc: Kamiyama offers to take Yaoling's place, as the lion proves to be heavier than she can handle. The staff asks for our help for the performance, as well...

title: To the Depths of Mementos
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. It seems the cause of everything is not in the real version of Chinatown. Let's head deeper into Mementos and continue our investigation.
targetText2: Clear without a Strategist party member
targetText3: Deal technical damage 1 or more times during battle

title: The True Cause...
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. We encounter a strangely upbeat Shadow in Mementos. From what we hear, it seems a strange Shadow is causing trouble...
targetText2: Clear with everyone's HP 50% or higher
targetText3: Deal weakness damage 4 or more times during battle

title: Nian Shou
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. This Nian Shou seems to be the one stealing the desires of the people wanting to enjoy the festival. Let's defeat the Nian Shou and reclaim everyone's desire!
targetText3: Use 1 or more normal attacks during battle

title: Pacify the Nian Shou
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. In the middle of battle, the Nian Shou suddenly changes colors. It seems like this isn't going to be an easy fight...
targetText3: At the end of battle, no allies have elemental ailments

title: Defeat the Nian Shou
desc: Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. The Nian Shou continues its rampage. Cattle tries to put an end to things with his Persona, but...
targetText3: At the end of battle, no allies have spiritual ailments

title: Reclaim your Lunar Desire
desc:
Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal. The Nian Shou is showing signs of fatigue.
This is our chance. Let's reclaim everybody's Lunar New Year desires!

title: Clad in Crimson
desc: Coming back from Mementos, Yaoling greets me dressed in a stunning Lunar New Year outfit...

title: A Big Success
desc:
The lion dance performance was a huge hit.
Let's all celebrate!

title: The Way Back
desc: As the festival comes to a close, I part ways with Yaoling at Yongen-Jaya. As we say our goodbyes, Yaoling expresses her feelings about the Lunar New Year festival we enjoyed together...

title: The Holidays with Big Bro
desc: Miyu has come to say goodbye to the New Year. It seems she's going to be doing a marionette show at theme park's New Year's event...

title: After Year-End Cleaning
desc: A bump into Tomiyama and Leo after finishing my year-end cleaning turned into a surprise inspection from Tomiyama to make sure I had cleaned everything properly...

title: New Year's Eve
desc: The Phantom Thieves gather to celebrate New Year's. After enjoying some handmade soba noodles, they reflect on the year that is to come...

title: Wishes for the Year's First Shrine Visit
desc: During their first shrine visit of the new year, the Phantom Thieves talked about the wishes they made. But then...

title: Japanese New Year's
desc: Yaoling and Yukimi visit to give well-wishes for the new year. It seems that Yukimi has taught Yaoling a lot about a "Japanese" New Year's...

title: Seeking the Holy Grail
desc: While out shopping by Shibuya Station during the holidays, I bump into Kurotani, who is on a quest to find "a holy grail of sweetness desired by the gods." But then, Haruna also shows up...
